dashboard.welcome: Welcome back! Here's what's happening on TopTop today.

platformHealth.title: Platform Health
platformHealth.systemNote: System is currently operating normally. Last backup: 14 minutes ago.

ops.subtitle: Operations overview, moderation, sounds, and product documentation.
ops.sharedBaseDesc: Admin uses color tokens, spacing, scrollbar styles from web and Button/Input/Badge/Avatar components from the shared UI package.
ops.moderationQueueDesc: Loaded from /admin/moderation/videos and prioritized by high-risk videos.
ops.newSoundsDesc: Manage public/original sounds in the system.
ops.docsMapDesc: Summarizes MD specs into admin-facing feature groups.
ops.videoModerationDesc: Uses the existing admin moderation endpoint without hardcoded production queues.
ops.soundManagementDesc: Search admin sounds and prepare create/update/delete actions.
ops.docsSummaryDesc: The detailed summary file was created at the repo root: PROJECT_MD_SUMMARY.md.
ops.emptyModerationDesc: Switch to another status or check the backend moderation worker.
ops.moderationLoadErrorDesc: Check the backend, admin login cookie, or ROLE_ADMIN permission.
ops.emptySoundsDesc: Try another keyword or create a new sound from admin.
